plugin.name: Command Center
plugin.description: Application settings for appearance, automation, shortcuts, and plugin management.
title: Command Center
description: Control appearance, language, startup behavior, tray behavior, shortcuts, and plugin management from one place.
plugins.rename.title: Change display name
general.output.title: Workspace
general.appearance.title: Appearance
general.behavior.title: Behavior
general.behavior.note: Tray handling, startup behavior, exit confirmation, and developer mode live together here so the app shell is easier to reason about.
general.backup.title: Backups
general.backup.note: Keep an encrypted safety trail of your workspace state, then restore from here when you need to roll back quickly.
quick_access.tab_note: Build a desktop-style quick launch strip for your most-used tools. Add tools, reorder them, and test the launcher here.
quick_access.title: Quick access
quick_access.note: These icons mirror the dashboard launcher. Drag the list to reorder, or use the move buttons for precise placement.
quick_access.empty: No quick access tools selected yet.
output.label: Default output folder
output.note: Tools export into this folder by default, and workspace choices here save immediately.
output.invalid.title: Output folder unavailable
output.invalid.body:
The selected output folder could not be used:

{error}
theme.label: Theme
font.label: UI font
language.label: Language
density.label: Density
scaling.label: UI scaling
appearance.note: Appearance, font, and language changes apply immediately.
backup.created.title: Backup created
backup.restore_confirm.title: Restore backup
backup.restore_confirm.body: This will overwrite app data and may replace bundled files. Continue?
backup.restored.title: Backup restored
backup.restored.body: The backup was restored. Restart Micro Toolkit to ensure every file is reloaded cleanly.
backup.failed.title: Backup failed
backup.safety_failed.title: Backup unavailable
startup.enabled: Autostart is enabled for this user profile.
startup.failed.title: Startup preference unavailable
startup.failed.body:
The startup preference could not be updated:

{error}
shortcuts.note: Application shortcuts are always available while the app is focused. Global shortcuts are optional, may depend on desktop permissions, and shortcut edits apply immediately.
shortcuts.status.available: Global shortcut registration is available in this session.
shortcuts.status.unavailable: Global shortcuts are unavailable in this session.
shortcuts.status.helper_active: The elevated hotkey helper is active for this session. Global shortcuts will be routed through the helper process.
shortcuts.status.helper_available: Global shortcuts are currently unavailable. {reason} Start the hotkey helper if you want global capture without elevating the main app.
shortcuts.saved.title: Shortcuts saved
shortcuts.helper_failed.title: Helper unavailable
shortcuts.helper_started.title: Helper started
shortcuts.helper_started.body: The hotkey helper is now active for this session.
plugins.note: Manage built-in and custom plugins here. Import plugin packages for the cleanest sharing flow, then use the table and context menu for direct trust, enabled, hidden, and display updates. Loose file and folder imports remain available for development and manual workflows.
plugins.name: Plugin
plugins.customization.title: Display Customization
plugins.customization.allowed: This plugin allows display name and icon overrides.
plugins.customization.locked: This plugin does not allow display name or icon overrides.
plugins.customization.saved.title: Customization saved
plugins.customization.reset.title: Customization reset
plugins.import_failed.title: Import failed
plugins.imported.title: Plugin imported
plugins.imported.body: Imported plugins: {plugins}. They were added disabled and untrusted pending review.
plugins.imported.deps_body: Dependency sidecars were detected for: {plugins}. Review and trust those plugins first, then right-click a row to install or repair dependencies.
plugins.export_failed.title: Export failed
plugins.export_failed.body: Select at least one plugin to export.
plugins.exported.title: Plugin package exported
plugins.deps.none.title: No dependency file
plugins.deps.none.body: This plugin does not declare a dependency sidecar.
plugins.deps.review_required.title: Trust required
plugins.deps.review_required.body: Review and trust this custom plugin before installing its dependencies.
plugins.deps.repair.title: Repair dependencies?
plugins.deps.repair.body: This will clear the current dependency runtime for this plugin and reinstall it from the dependency sidecar.
plugins.deps.installed.title: Dependencies ready
plugins.deps.failed.title: Dependency installation failed
plugins.deps.clear.title: Clear plugin dependencies?
plugins.deps.clear.body: This will remove the installed dependency runtime for this plugin. You can reinstall it later from the same dependency sidecar.
plugins.deps.cleared.title: Dependencies cleared
plugins.deps.cleared.empty: No installed dependency runtime was found for {plugin}.
plugins.trust_required.title: Trust required
plugins.trust_required.body: Review and trust this custom plugin before enabling it.
plugins.review_prompt.title: Trust custom plugins?
plugins.blocked.title: Plugins blocked
plugins.blocked.body:
These custom plugins remain blocked because the static scan detected critical-risk patterns:

{plugins}
plugins.blocked.reason: The static safety scan detected critical-risk patterns. This plugin remains quarantined until removed or replaced.
plugins.applied.title: Plugin settings updated
plugins.applied.body: Plugin trust, visibility, and enabled state were updated.
plugins.reset.title: Plugins reset
plugins.reset.body: Plugin overrides and states were reset to their defaults.
saved.title: Settings saved
